data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of click/session attribution records, which are explicitly mentioned as a need in the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not provide any information or records related to click/session attribution, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical data means the requirement is not met, leading to a failed validation.
gaps: Click/session attribution records are not present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add click/session attribution records
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that click/session attribution records are created and associated with the relevant offers.
